human_actions_pending.action: After Plan 04-10 completes, decide whether to file a v1.1 follow-up to add incremental jsonl writing to the validation binary
human_actions_pending.context: Validation binary buffers all records and only writes report.jsonl on clean process exit. Caused 2 wasted sweep attempts in this session. Long-term structural improvement.

decisions.decision: Treat the user's `--gaps` as the workflow's documented `--gaps-only` flag
decisions.rationale: The literal `--gaps-only` is what execute-phase.md's filter logic checks for, but `--gaps` is unambiguous given the recently-created gap-closure plans 04-07..04-10 and the absence of any other meaning.

decisions.decision: Discard prior-session dirty state at session start (option b)
decisions.rationale: Found 7 locked leftover worktrees + staged 04-07-per-fn-summary.json (782 lines) + planning edits from a prior interrupted run. User chose clean restart over salvage. Preserved 04-08's worktree separately when 04-07's restart was needed.

decisions.decision: Salvage 04-07 commits 12dc731 + 8dffdbf via cherry-pick after the 6h subagent stall
decisions.rationale: The original gsd-executor for 04-07 went silent for 6h+ after committing Tasks 7.1+7.2, never returning a completion signal. Force-removing the orphan worktree dropped the branch but git objects survived. Cherry-pick onto master (0576afb, a61e572) recovered ~2h of executor work.

decisions.decision: Mark Task 7.3 PARTIAL with documented deferral rather than continue chasing the sweep
decisions.rationale: Two sweep attempts (38 min crashed at BLOCX, 48 min timeout at TPSSLOCC) produced zero report.jsonl records due to validation binary's buffering. Wave 2 (04-09) only depends on Tasks 7.1+7.2 (structural fix). Plan 04-10's order-3 sweep redoes the same work. Continuing inline burns wall-clock with low marginal value.

decisions.decision: Add XC_BLOCX to the `excluded_by_upstream_spec` skip-list mirroring BR×3 + CSC pattern
decisions.rationale: C++ tmath::log_expand asserts x0 > 0 and aborts the entire validation process when BLOCX's internal log evaluates at non-positive intermediate at low-density tail. Reformulating BLOCX kernel to avoid log-of-near-zero would alter parity contract; skipping matches existing protocol and defers fix to Phase 6 (guarded log expansion).

next_action: Run `/gsd:execute-phase 4 --gaps` after `/clear`. Orchestrator skips completed plans (04-07, 04-08) automatically and resumes from Wave 2 (Plan 04-09 contracted-metaGGA), then Wave 3 (Plan 04-10 resignoff CHECKPOINT). Plan 04-09 should be quick (~30-60 min, mostly test extension). Plan 04-10 will hit a checkpoint requiring user interaction.
context_notes: Phase 4 gap closure was driven by 04-VERIFICATION.md's gaps_found verdict. Plans 04-07/08/09/10 were created by an earlier /gsd:plan-phase --gaps run. Wave 1 (04-07 + 04-08) completed this session: 04-07 PARTIAL (Tasks 7.1+7.2 land the structural fix; Task 7.3 sweep deferred to 04-10) and 04-08 COMPLETE (3 ERF + 2 LDA-corr D-19 forwards). Wave 2 (04-09) is unblocked. Wave 3 (04-10) is the final sign-off and will produce the order-3 report.jsonl that supersedes 04-07's deferred Task 7.3 deliverable. Phase 4's must_haves: MGGA-01..05, MODE-03, ALIAS-01..06 — all on track for 04-10 sign-off (with caveats: BLOCX excluded, BR×3+CSC excluded, and likely some new D-19 forwards if SCAN/M05/M06 hit tmath_die). Total session: ~9h dominated by the 6h orphaned-agent stall + 2 failed sweep attempts.
